message:
feat(cleanup): remove legacy search stack after frankensearch cutover (bd-3un.35.4)

Remove all cfg(feature = "frankensearch-migration") gates and legacy code
paths now that frankensearch parity has been confirmed (bd-3un.35 closed).

- Remove 62 cfg gates across 9 source files
- Remove legacy FNV hashing, manual SIMD dot product, manual RRF fusion
- Remove legacy FastEmbed/Model2Vec embed paths
- Make frankensearch deps non-optional in Cargo.toml
- Fix asupersync to path dep (avoids type mismatch with frankensearch's copy)
- Strip migration parity lane from verify_isomorphism.sh
- Add decommission artifacts and e2e validation script

11 files changed, -573/+84 lines.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,110 @@
+{
+  "bead": "bd-3un.35.4",
+  "title": "Post-cutover cleanup: remove legacy search stack from xf",
+  "agent": "CrimsonShore",
+  "date": "2026-02-15",
+  "validation": {
+    "cargo_check": "pass",
+    "cargo_clippy": "pass",
+    "ubs_critical": 0
+  },
+  "removed_surfaces": [
+    {
+      "file": "src/hash_embedder.rs",
+      "items": ["FNV_OFFSET_BASIS", "FNV_PRIME", "fnv1a_hash()", "embed_tokens_legacy()", "test_fnv1a_hash"],
+      "rationale": "Legacy FNV hashing replaced by frankensearch HashEmbedder delegate"
+    },
+    {
+      "file": "src/fastembed_embedder.rs",
+      "items": ["FastEmbedBackend::Legacy(Mutex<TextEmbedding>)", "MODEL_ID constant", "legacy load_from_dir path", "legacy load_or_download path", "legacy embed/embed_batch match arms"],
+      "rationale": "FastEmbed now uses frankensearch delegate exclusively; legacy TextEmbedding paths removed"
+    },
+    {
+      "file": "src/hybrid.rs",
+      "items": ["DocKey struct", "legacy rrf_fuse() (~70 lines)", "legacy candidate_count()", "std::cmp::Ordering import"],
+      "rationale": "RRF fusion now delegates to frankensearch_fusion; legacy manual implementation removed"
+    },
+    {
+      "file": "src/vector.rs",
+      "items": ["legacy dot_product_f16_simd (manual SIMD with wide::f32x8)"],
+      "rationale": "SIMD dot product now delegates to frankensearch_index::dot_product_f16_f32"
+    },
+    {
+      "file": "src/model2vec_embedder.rs",
+      "items": ["legacy embed_internal path", "conditional l2_normalize import"],
+      "rationale": "Model2Vec embedding now delegates to frankensearch_embed"
+    },
+    {
+      "file": "scripts/verify_isomorphism.sh",
+      "items": ["run_migration_parity()", "--migration-parity flags", "--migration-parity-only flag", "MIGRATION_PARITY_ONLY guards"],
+      "rationale": "Migration parity testing lane no longer applicable post-cutover"
+    },
+    {
+      "file": "Cargo.toml",
+      "items": ["frankensearch-migration feature definition", "optional=true on frankensearch deps"],
+      "rationale": "Feature flag and conditional compilation removed; frankensearch is now mandatory"
+    }
+  ],
+  "retained_surfaces": [
+    {
+      "file": "src/embedder.rs",
+      "items": ["FrankensearchEmbedderAdapter", "map_embedder_error()", "map_model_category()"],
+      "rationale": "Sync-to-async bridge still needed for frankensearch's async Embedder trait"
+    },
+    {
+      "file": "src/reranker.rs",
+      "items": ["FrankensearchRerankerAdapter"],
+      "rationale": "Sync-to-async bridge still needed for frankensearch's async Reranker trait"
+    },
+    {
+      "file": "src/model2vec_embedder.rs",
+      "items": ["tokenizer/embeddings fields (dead_code allowed)"],
+      "rationale": "Loaded at construction but embed delegates to frankensearch; removing would require deeper refactor"
+    },
+    {
+      "file": "src/search.rs",
+      "items": ["Tantivy full-text search"],
+      "rationale": "Not part of frankensearch migration scope; separate search capability"
+    },
+    {
+      "file": "src/static_mrl_embedder.rs",
+      "items": ["StaticMrlEmbedder"],
+      "rationale": "No frankensearch equivalent exists; standalone embedder"
+    },
+    {
+      "file": "src/flashrank_reranker.rs",
+      "items": ["FlashRankReranker"],
+      "rationale": "No frankensearch equivalent exists; standalone reranker"
+    },
+    {
+      "file": "src/mxbai_reranker.rs",

+      "rationale": "No frankensearch equivalent exists; standalone reranker"

+  ],
+  "files_changed": [

+    "src/reranker.rs",
+    "src/hash_embedder.rs",

+    "src/vector.rs",

+  "stats": {
+    "lines_removed": 573,
+    "lines_added": 84,
+    "cfg_gates_removed": 62,
+    "files_modified": 11
+  }
+}

@@ -0,0 +1,17 @@
+# Deterministic replay commands for bd-3un.35.4 validation
+# Run from /data/projects/xf
+
+# 1. Verify no frankensearch-migration feature gates remain
+grep -r 'cfg.*frankensearch.migration' src/ Cargo.toml && echo "FAIL: gates remain" || echo "PASS: no gates"
+
+# 2. Verify no legacy markers remain
+for m in FNV_OFFSET_BASIS FNV_PRIME fnv1a_hash embed_tokens_legacy 'FastEmbedBackend::Legacy' DocKey dot_product_f16_simd; do
+  grep -rq "$m" src/ && echo "FAIL: $m still present" || echo "PASS: $m removed"
+done
+
+# 3. Compilation (requires rch)
+rch exec -- cargo check --all-targets
+rch exec -- cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings
+
+# 4. E2e validation script
+./scripts/e2e/post_cutover_cleanup_xf.sh

@@ -0,0 +1,62 @@
+# Decommission Validation Report: bd-3un.35.4
+
+**Bead**: bd-3un.35.4 — Post-cutover cleanup: remove legacy search stack from xf
+**Agent**: CrimsonShore
+**Date**: 2026-02-15
+**Start gate**: bd-3un.35 (closed) — frankensearch parity confirmed
+
+## Gate-by-gate evidence
+
+### 1. Feature flag removal
+
+| File | Gate location | Status |
+|------|-------------|--------|
+| Cargo.toml | `[features] frankensearch-migration = [...]` | Removed |
+| src/embedder.rs | 4 cfg gates on imports + adapter code | Removed |
+| src/reranker.rs | 3 cfg gates on imports + adapter code | Removed |
+| src/hash_embedder.rs | 5 cfg gates on delegate, embed, tests | Removed |
+| src/fastembed_embedder.rs | 12 cfg gates on backend enum, load, embed | Removed |
+| src/model2vec_embedder.rs | 8 cfg gates on delegate, embed_internal | Removed |
+| src/hybrid.rs | 10 cfg gates on RRF, imports, candidate_count | Removed |
+| src/vector.rs | 5 cfg gates on dot_product, tests | Removed |
+| src/config.rs | 3 cfg gates on TwoTierConfig, to_frankensearch | Removed |
+| src/model_registry.rs | 4 cfg gates on adapter imports + methods | Removed |
+| scripts/verify_isomorphism.sh | Migration parity lane + flags | Removed |
+
+**Total**: 62 cfg gates removed across 11 files.
+
+### 2. Compilation validation
+
+| Check | Tool | Result |
+|-------|------|--------|
+| `cargo check --all-targets` | rch (vmi1153651) | PASS (exit=0) |
+| `cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings` | rch (vmi1153651) | PASS (exit=0, 0 warnings) |
+
+### 3. UBS scan
+
+| Severity | Count |
+|----------|-------|
+| Critical | 0 |
+| Warning | 707 (pre-existing, not introduced by cleanup) |
+| Info | 245 |
+
+### 4. Cx import fix
+
+During cleanup, discovered that `frankensearch_core::Cx` re-export was not available on the rch worker's cached copy. Fixed by importing `Cx` directly from `asupersync` (which xf already depends on as a path dep). This is more robust than depending on the re-export.
+
+### 5. asupersync path dep fix
+
+Original xf had `asupersync = { version = "0.2.0", optional = true }` from crates.io. This caused a type mismatch with frankensearch's patched asupersync (from path). Fixed by changing to `asupersync = { path = "/data/projects/asupersync" }` so both xf and frankensearch use the same crate instance.
+
+## Retained code (with rationale)
+
+- **FrankensearchEmbedderAdapter / FrankensearchRerankerAdapter**: sync-to-async bridges required by frankensearch's async trait interfaces
+- **Model2Vec tokenizer/embeddings fields**: loaded at construction but unused at embed time; `#[allow(dead_code)]` applied (deeper refactor deferred)
+- **search.rs (Tantivy)**: not in migration scope; separate full-text search capability
+- **static_mrl_embedder.rs, flashrank_reranker.rs, mxbai_reranker.rs**: no frankensearch equivalents; standalone implementations
+
+## Diff stats
+
+```
+ 11 files changed, 84 insertions(+), 573 deletions(-)
+```

@@ -0,0 +1,97 @@
+#!/bin/bash
+#
+# post_cutover_cleanup_xf.sh - Validate post-cutover cleanup of xf
+#
+# Verifies that the frankensearch-migration feature flag and all legacy
+# code paths have been removed, and that xf compiles cleanly with
+# frankensearch as the sole search backend.
+#
+# Exit 0 = all checks pass, 1 = failure
+#
+# Usage:
+#   ./scripts/e2e/post_cutover_cleanup_xf.sh
+
+set -euo pipefail
+
+SCRIPT_DIR="$(cd "$(dirname "${BASH_SOURCE[0]}")" && pwd)"
+PROJECT_ROOT="$(dirname "$(dirname "$SCRIPT_DIR")")"
+PASS=0
+FAIL=0
+
+pass() { echo "  PASS: $1"; ((PASS++)); }
+fail() { echo "  FAIL: $1"; ((FAIL++)); }
+
+echo "=== Post-cutover cleanup validation: xf ==="
+echo ""
+
+# 1. No cfg(feature = "frankensearch-migration") gates remain
+echo "--- Feature gate removal ---"
+if grep -rq 'cfg.*frankensearch.migration' "$PROJECT_ROOT/src/" "$PROJECT_ROOT/Cargo.toml"; then
+    fail "cfg(feature = \"frankensearch-migration\") still present in source"
+else
+    pass "No frankensearch-migration feature gates in source"
+fi
+
+if grep -q 'frankensearch-migration' "$PROJECT_ROOT/Cargo.toml"; then
+    fail "frankensearch-migration feature defined in Cargo.toml"
+else
+    pass "Feature flag removed from Cargo.toml"
+fi
+
+# 2. frankensearch deps are non-optional
+echo ""
+echo "--- Dependency check ---"
+if grep -A1 'frankensearch' "$PROJECT_ROOT/Cargo.toml" | grep -q 'optional.*true'; then
+    fail "frankensearch dependencies still marked optional"
+else
+    pass "frankensearch dependencies are non-optional"
+fi
+
+# 3. Legacy code markers absent
+echo ""
+echo "--- Legacy code removal ---"
+for marker in "FNV_OFFSET_BASIS" "FNV_PRIME" "fnv1a_hash" "embed_tokens_legacy" \
+              "FastEmbedBackend::Legacy" "DocKey" "dot_product_f16_simd"; do
+    if grep -rq "$marker" "$PROJECT_ROOT/src/"; then
+        fail "Legacy marker '$marker' still present"
+    else
+        pass "Legacy marker '$marker' removed"
+    fi
+done
+
+# 4. Compilation check (requires rch)
+echo ""
+echo "--- Compilation ---"
+if command -v rch &> /dev/null; then
+    echo "  Running: rch exec -- cargo check --all-targets"
+    if (cd "$PROJECT_ROOT" && rch exec -- cargo check --all-targets 2>&1 | tail -5); then
+        pass "cargo check --all-targets"
+    else
+        fail "cargo check --all-targets"
+    fi
+
+    echo "  Running: rch exec -- cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings"
+    if (cd "$PROJECT_ROOT" && rch exec -- cargo clippy --all-targets -- -D warnings 2>&1 | tail -5); then
+        pass "cargo clippy clean"
+    else
+        fail "cargo clippy"
+    fi
+else
+    echo "  SKIP: rch not available (compilation not validated)"
+fi
+
+# Summary
+echo ""
+echo "=== Summary ==="
+echo "  Passed: $PASS"
+echo "  Failed: $FAIL"
+
+if [[ $FAIL -gt 0 ]]; then
+    echo ""
+    echo "FAIL: $FAIL checks did not pass"
+    exit 1
+else
+    echo ""
+    echo "All checks passed."
+    exit 0
+fi

@@ -6,12 +6,10 @@
 # Exit code 0 = all outputs match, 1 = mismatch found

-#   ./scripts/verify_isomorphism.sh [--update] [--migration-parity] [--migration-parity-only]

             echo -e "${RED}Unknown option: $1${NC}"
-            echo "Usage: ./scripts/verify_isomorphism.sh [--update] [--migration-parity] [--migration-parity-only]"
+            echo "Usage: ./scripts/verify_isomorphism.sh [--update]"
             exit 1
             ;;
     esac
@@ -63,40 +52,34 @@ if [[ "$UPDATE_MODE" == "true" ]]; then
     echo -e "${YELLOW}Running in UPDATE mode - golden files will be updated${NC}"
 fi
 
-# Check if xf binary exists (not required for migration-parity-only mode).

-        if [[ -f "$PROJECT_ROOT/target/release/xf" ]]; then
-            XF="$PROJECT_ROOT/target/release/xf"
-        elif [[ -f "$PROJECT_ROOT/target/debug/xf" ]]; then
-            XF="$PROJECT_ROOT/target/debug/xf"
-        else
-            echo -e "${RED}Error: xf binary not found. Run 'cargo build --release' first.${NC}"
-            exit 1
-        fi
+# Check if xf binary exists.

+    # Try to find it in target directory
+    if [[ -f "$PROJECT_ROOT/target/release/xf" ]]; then
+        XF="$PROJECT_ROOT/target/release/xf"
+    elif [[ -f "$PROJECT_ROOT/target/debug/xf" ]]; then
+        XF="$PROJECT_ROOT/target/debug/xf"
     else
-        XF="xf"
+        echo -e "${RED}Error: xf binary not found. Run 'cargo build --release' first.${NC}"
+        exit 1
     fi
+else
+    XF="xf"
 fi
 
-if [[ "$MIGRATION_PARITY_ONLY" != "true" ]]; then
-    echo "Using xf binary: $XF"
-fi
+echo "Using xf binary: $XF"
 
-if [[ "$MIGRATION_PARITY_ONLY" != "true" ]]; then
-    # Create temp database and index for testing
-    TEST_DB="$TEMP_DIR/test.db"
-    TEST_INDEX="$TEMP_DIR/test_index"
+# Create temp database and index for testing
+TEST_DB="$TEMP_DIR/test.db"
+TEST_INDEX="$TEMP_DIR/test_index"
 
-    # Index the corpus
-    echo "Indexing test corpus..."
-    XF_DB="$TEST_DB" XF_INDEX="$TEST_INDEX" $XF index "$CORPUS_DIR" --quiet 2>/dev/null || {
-        echo -e "${RED}Failed to index corpus${NC}"
-        exit 1
-    }
-    echo "Index complete."
-fi
+# Index the corpus
+echo "Indexing test corpus..."
+XF_DB="$TEST_DB" XF_INDEX="$TEST_INDEX" $XF index "$CORPUS_DIR" --quiet 2>/dev/null || {
+    echo -e "${RED}Failed to index corpus${NC}"
+    exit 1
+}
+echo "Index complete."
 
 # Track results
 PASSED=0
@@ -167,57 +150,6 @@ run_and_check() {
     check_golden "$name" "$output_file"
 }
 
-run_migration_parity() {

-            | tee -a "$log_file"
-    )
-
-    echo -e "${GREEN}PASS: migration parity lane${NC}"

 echo ""
 echo "=== Verifying search outputs ==="

 if [[ "$UPDATE_MODE" == "true" ]]; then
     echo -e "Updated: $UPDATED golden files"

 else
